name: GOLFTEC Northwest Las Vegas
address: 10470 W Cheyenne Ave Suite 130, Las Vegas, NV 89129
about: GOLFTEC Northwest Las Vegas is a high-tech golf training studio focused on personalized coaching and data-driven improvement. The facility utilizes advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and club fitting services. Lessons are structured around creating personalized game plans, with a curriculum that includes on-course playing lessons and continuous strategy refinement. The center operates with a team of PGA-certified coaches who emphasize long-term progress and measurable results for golfers of all skill levels. A pro shop is available, offering merchandise at a 10% discount retail prices, and students can purchase custom-fit clubs from top brands following a fitting session.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and high-speed cameras
Personalized improvement plans led by PGA-certified coaches
Advanced club fitting technology resulting in 21 more yards on average

simulator_hardware.notes: Referenced in content as launch monitors used for fittings and practice

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or GOLFTEC provides clubs for use during lessons and practice sessions. Their club fitting service also helps you find the perfect equipment from brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food or drink service, and no BYOB policy is specified. The focus is on training and coaching, so outside food and drink may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC's sessions are structured around skill development and practice, not full 18-hole simulation. Typical lessons or practice sessions are scheduled in one-hour blocks to focus on specific areas of the game.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and instruction designed for younger players. Their technology and coaching methods are suitable for developing junior golfers with a focus on structured improvement.
